title: $formfocus
text: $formfocus Return the name of the Form instance that has focus. $formfocus Return Values String that contains the name of the form instance (or form in a sequence of modal forms) that currently has focus. Use Use in Form components. Description The $formfocus function is particularly useful in (local) services and global ProcScript. Example: Reporting the Instance that has Focus The following example reports the name of the instance that currently has focus in the message frame: putmess "The form instance %%$formfocus has focus." Copy Related Links setformfocus Set the focus to the specified component instance. trigger getFocus (Form) Interactive trigger that responds to the form getting focus. trigger loseFocus (Form) ProcScript module that responds to the form losing focus. It can be used to verify the data to ensure that it is complete or correct. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
